title: Thoughts on Claude Fable's silent safeguards
summary: Thoughts on Claude Fable's silent safeguards
whyItMatters: [Thanks to Julian Minder for helpful discussion and review.] Claude Fable 5 and its new safeguards Yesterday, Anthropic publicly released Claude Fable 5. Fable 5 is a Mythos-class model – a model class above Opus, Anthropic's previous premium tier – and, as assessed by multiple benchmarks, it is the most capable model to date.
